steps.title: Look for agency and authority
steps.content: The claim needs soldiers setting off with renewed confidence and control. The best quotation should show active movement, assertive posture, or a sense of possession.

steps.title: Find active possession
steps.content: The image of men throwing out their chests, galloping, and laying claims of possession to the earth shows authority. Choice A is church music, Choice B is travel scenery, and Choice D shows kneeling and kissing the ground. The answer is C.
